languages.text: {n}Женщина стреляет не задумываясь, но вы оказываетесь быстрее. Заряд автопистолета уходит в сторону, несколько секунд — и преступница, лишенная оружия, уже стоит на коленях, скрученная блюстителями. Красная от ярости Иокаста рычит:{/n} "Я позабочусь о ее наказании, Лорд-капитан, если только вы не предпочтете сделать это сами".

{n}The woman shoots without thinking, but you are faster. The autopistol round veers off to the side, and, within seconds, the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."
languages.original_text: {n}Женщина стреляет не задумываясь, но вы оказываетесь быстрее. Заряд автопистолета уходит в сторону, несколько секунд — и преступница, лишенная оружия, уже стоит на коленях, скрученная блюстителями. Красная от ярости Иокаста рычит:{/n} "Я позабочусь о ее наказании, Лорд-капитан, если только вы не предпочтете сделать это сами".

The autopistol round veers off to the side, and, within seconds, the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

languages.text: {n}銃を構えた女は躊躇なく発砲するが、あなたはそれを上回る速度で銃撃をかわす。銃弾は女の脇をすり抜けていく。数秒後、女は既に膝をついて、銃を奪われ、拘束されていた。怒りに燃えるサウアーバックは、こう言った。{/n}「彼女の処罰は私が引き受けます。もしあなたが自ら行いたいのなら、どうぞ」
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots without thinking, but you are faster. The laspistol charge veers off to the side, and, within seconds, the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: 銃を構えた女は躊躇なく発砲するが、あなたはそれを上回る速度で銃撃をかわす。銃弾は女の脇をすり抜けていく。数秒後、女は既に膝をついて、銃を奪われ、拘束されていた。怒りに燃えるサウアーバックは、こう言った。「彼女の処罰は私が引き受けます。もしあなたが自ら行いたいのなら、どうぞ。」

languages.text: {n}Kadın düşünmeden ateş ediyor fakat sen ondan hızlı çıkıyorsun. Mermi yana doğru sapıyor ve saniyeler içinde fail dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor, silahsızlandırılıyor ve infazcılarca zapt ediliyor. Öfkeden kıpkırmızı kesilen Sauerback hırlıyor.{/n} "Cezalandırılmasını sağlayacağım Lord Kaptan, tabii kendiniz cezalandırmak isterseniz başka."
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots without thinking, but you are faster. The autopistol round veers off to the side, and, within seconds, the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kadın düşünmeden ateş ediyor fakat sen ondan hızlı çıkıyorsun. Mermi yana doğru sapıyor ve saniyeler içinde fail dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor, silahsızlandırılıyor ve infazcılarca zapt ediliyor. Öfkeden kıpkırmızı kesilen Sauerback hırlıyor.{/n} "Cezalandırılmasını sağlayacağım Lord Kaptan, tabii kendiniz cezalandırmak isterseniz başka."

languages.text: {n}La mujer dispara sin pensar, pero tú eres más rápid{mf|o|a}. La bala de la pistola automática se desvía a un lado y, en unos segundos, la criminal está de rodillas, desarmada y sujeta por tus guardias. Roja de rabia, Sauerback gruñe:{/n} «Me encargaré de su castigo, Lord Capitán, a menos que prefiera hacerlo usted mism{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots without thinking, but you are faster. The autopistol round veers off to the side, and, within seconds, the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}La mujer dispara sin pensar, pero tú eres más rápid{mf|o|a}. La bala de la pistola automática se desvía a un lado y, en unos segundos, la criminal está de rodillas, desarmada y sujeta por tus guardias. Roja de rabia, Sauerback gruñe:{/n} «Me encargaré de su castigo, Lord Capitán, a menos que prefiera hacerlo usted mism{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: {n}女人不假思索地扣动扳机，但你的动作更快——自动手枪的子弹偏离了目标。几秒钟后，行凶者便已跪倒在地，被执法者缴械并制服。苏尔贝克气得满脸通红，咆哮道，{/n}“我会监督惩处，舰长大人，或者您也可以亲自处决她。”
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots without thinking, but you are faster. The autopistol round veers off to the side, and, within seconds, the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}女人不假思索地扣动扳机，但你的动作更快——自动手枪的子弹偏离了目标。几秒钟后，行凶者便已跪倒在地，被执法者缴械并制服。苏尔贝克气得满脸通红，咆哮道，{/n}“我会监督惩处，舰长大人，或者您也可以亲自处决她。”

languages.text: {n}La femme tire sans réfléchir, mais vous êtes plus rapide et parvenez à dévier la balle de pistolet-mitrailleur. Quelques secondes plus tard, la coupable est déjà à genoux, désarmée et maîtrisée par les prévôts. Rouge de colère, Sauerback gronde :{/n} « Je me chargerai de son châtiment, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, à moins que vous ne souhaitiez le faire vous-même. »
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots without thinking, but you are faster. The autopistol round veers off to the side, and, within seconds, the perpetrator is already on her knees, disarmed and restrained by enforcers. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."

traits.locale_text: {n}La femme tire sans réfléchir, mais vous êtes plus rapide et parvenez à dévier la balle de pistolet-mitrailleur. Quelques secondes plus tard, la coupable est déjà à genoux, désarmée et maîtrisée par les prévôts. Rouge de colère, Sauerback gronde :{/n} « Je me chargerai de son châtiment, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, à moins que vous ne souhaitiez le faire vous-même. »

languages.text: {n}Die Frau schießt, ohne nachzudenken, aber du bist schneller. Die Ladung der Laserpistole geht daneben, und binnen Sekunden ist die Frau auf den Knien, entwaffnet und unter Kontrolle der Enforcer. Sauerback knurrt rot vor Wut:{/n} "Ich werde mich um ihre Bestrafung kümmern, Lord Captain, außer Ihr wollt sie selbst durchführen."
languages.original_text: {n}The woman shoots without thinking, but you are faster. Crimson with rage, Sauerback snarls,{/n} "I will see to her punishment, Lord Captain, unless you would prefer to do it yourself."
